title: Efficacy and Tolerability of Zenocutuzumab in Advanced NRG1 Fusion-Positive Cholangiocarcinoma: Results From the eNRGy Phase II Trial.
abstract: Presently, to our knowledge, there are no approved targeted therapies for neuregulin 1 gene fusion-positive ( NRG1 +) cholangiocarcinoma. Zenocutuzumab, a HER2 × HER3 bispecific antibody, is approved for previously treated, advanced/metastatic NRG1 + non-small cell lung cancer and pancreatic adenocarcinoma. Here, we report results for 22 patients with NRG1 + cholangiocarcinoma in the eNRGy trial.
